response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Stripe, but the resume does not demonstrate the director-level IC profile, recognized AI expertise, or shipped AI products/platforms required for a Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy. Tenure (~13-14 years of professional experience post-2012) falls short of the 15-year minimum, and there is no evidence of cloud/AI platform strategy work, advising strategic customers, or driving org-wide technical direction.
strengths: Polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure at reputable companies (Stripe, Shopify, Datadog)
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic developer tooling at Stripe
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, open-source contributions, workshops, and public talks
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Lacks director-level IC scope: no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping multi-org technical strategy
Experience level and credentials (BS only, ~13 yrs) below the 15-year minimum and preferred advanced AI degree

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI/ML expertise and shipped AI platforms
No director-level IC / strategy-advisory track record
Recent MCP and agentic tooling work at Stripe
